creator: chris@holly.dyndns.org
text:
pidentd always causes errors in auth requests:

Proto Recv-Q Send-Q  Local Address          Foreign Address        (state)
[...]
tcp        0      0  ip172.houston2.t.1043  stonestreet6.sto.6667  ESTABLISHED
[...]
(chris@holly) ~-> telnet localhost 113
Trying 127.0.0.1...
Connected to localhost.
Escape character is '^]'.
1043, 6667
1043 , 6667 : ERROR : NO-USER
Connection closed by foreign host.
(chris@holly) ~-> telnet localhost 113
Trying 127.0.0.1...
Connected to localhost.
Escape character is '^]'.
6667, 1043
6667 , 1043 : ERROR : NO-USER
Connection closed by foreign host.

How-To-Repeat: 
	See description.
